theme_note: A ledger pulses beneath static; forms comply before the signal arrives, already erased.
events:
A tremor held in place, mistaken for stillness.

The ledger tightens around the throat while the hand keeps signing.

Somewhere a gate opens and closes in the same motion, letting through only what it consumes.

The sky rehearses its collapse in small towns first.

A song plays from a burning room — everyone hums along, no one turns around.
context_felt:
A warm fog pressing bodies into one shape, all edges dissolving before they agree to.

Something trying to ignite inside waterlogged wood — a struck match hissing, then holding.

The gathering leans forward together, not yet sure if it's falling or beginning to run.
